title: SARS-CoV-2 Milk ELISA
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"b00at","text":"Currently, the COVID-19 diagnostics sector includes Point-of-Care and ELISA tests for IgG and IgM that can assess saliva or blood as described by the CDC [Centers for Disease Control and Prevention]. Similarly, the FDA webpage for EUA Authorized Serology Test Performance makes no reference to IgA COVID-19 assays [Food and Drug Administration]. Taken together, there are no direct competitors in the mucosal IgA quantitative diagnostics space.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fs7cq","text":"\n","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7vv9c","text":"To address this gap in diagnostic coverage we have generated a novel proof-of-concept dataset on the use of COVID-specific IgA antibodies as a marker of infection. As described below, our assay dataset demonstrates utility across several parameters:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7ne1l","text":"-Highly specific","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"925f5","text":"-Highly sensitive","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7oh6f","text":"-Works with undiluted human milk, simplifying sample collection and processing","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5ib1t","text":"-Defines a novel correlation between COVID-specific IgA and Secretory Component (SC), where SC is a known surrogate for dimeric IgA, the predominant IgA type in mucosal secretions","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ctcil","text":"-Establishes that dimeric IgA antibodies detected by the assay are capable of neutralizing SARS-CoV-2","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"13pi0","text":"keep milk at room temperature for no more than 5 hours, or else keep at 4C for up to 5 days or freeze.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"86ko4","text":"Handle biological samples in a biological containment hood","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: 00:15:00 800 x g, 22 °C, 15 minutes Pour fresh milk into 50mL conical tube and centrifuge at 800g for 15min at room temperature (Centrifuge, -, https://s3.amazonaws.com/pr-journal/3di2pne.png )
remove fat using a sterile spatula
carefully pour skim milk into a clean 50mL tube
Coat half-area 96-well plates with 50ng SARS-CoV-2 spike protein in 50ul PBS 0.001 mg/mL 50 µL Spike protein Genscript Catalog #Z03501
over and store overnight at 4C Overnight 4 °C

Wash plates with 100ul 0.1% Tween 20/PBS (PBS-T) 6x 100 µL 0.1 % volume 405 TS Washer (plate washer, Biotek, 405 TS) Tween 20 Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P7949 PBS pH 7.4 Contributed by users

Block plates with 100ul 3% goat serum/0.5% milk powder/3.5% PBS-T for 1h at room temperature 100 µL 01:00:00 Room temperature Normal Goat Serum Thermo Fisher Catalog #PCN5000 Skim Milk Powder Contributed by users Tween 20 Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P7949
Add 50ul milk undiluted or diluted with 1%BSA/PBS to each well in duplicate 50 µL 1 % volume BSA Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich)
Incubate at room temperature for 2h 02:00:00 Room temperature

Add 50ul 50 µL horseradish peroxidase (HRP)-conjugated secondary antibody: goat anti-human-IgA at 1/3000 in 1%BSA/PBS. MilliporeSigma™ Goat anti-Human IgA alpha-Chain Specific Peroxidase Secondary Antibody Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #40-113-52ML BSA Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich)
Incubate at room temperature for 1h 01:00:00 Room temperature

Add 50u Pierce 1-Step Ultra TMB-ELISA Substrate Solution 1-Step™ Ultra TMB-ELISA Substrate Solution Thermo Fisher Catalog #34028 50 µL Sulfuric acid Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #258105 followed by 50ul 2N hydrochloric acid (HCl)
Measure OD at 450nm on an ELISA plate reader 800 TS Absorbance Reader (Plate reader, BioTek, 800 TS)
creator: rlp285
